creator: dk@catpipe.net
text:
Hello,

I would like to relinquish maintainership of the port in question.
I approve the patch though.

/dk

On Tue, Jul 22, 2008 at 01:10:29PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/pear-HTML_QuickForm_Controller,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/125866 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125866
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Sincerely,
	Dmitry Karasik
